name: homepage_0_home

observed_strengths.observation: Subscribe & Save CTA in primary navigation alongside 'Subscription Perks' and 'Choose Your Coffee' links — subscription is a top-nav priority, not buried
'Build Your Own Bundle' with 'Save Up to 15% Off' linked from homepage — bundle builder actively merchandised as an AOV lever
'WIN FREE COFFEE FOR A YEAR' giveaway CTA sitewide — urgency/engagement mechanism drives purchase (purchase entry required to win)
Full brew-format navigation: Ground/Whole Bean, Single-Serve Pods, Canned Lattes, Cold Brew, Espresso Capsules, Instant — broad product range organized by brewing method for immediate buyer clarity
Strong meta description with USDA Organic, Fair Trade, arabica/robusta source countries — SEO-rich and differentiating

missing_or_weak.observation: No H1 heading on homepage — page structure starts at H2; primary keyword ('Death Wish Coffee') is in page title but no H1 present which weakens on-page SEO signal
'NEW ARRIVALS' section features Father Time Mug and Father Time Tee — merch-heavy new arrivals may not drive core coffee subscription conversion from first-time visitors

purchase_path_notes: Homepage is subscription-forward and bundle-forward — architecture matches a mature DTC coffee brand. The missing H1 and merch-heavy new arrivals are minor gaps in an otherwise strong entry experience.
